{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191822E1CFC67C72F889B33BC3"}"},"total":100},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7389958471025836862","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完了，虽然有点烂尾，但是我还是很喜欢，主角的性格我真的觉得很棒，是我喜欢的类型，包括他与那四个小孩（详细写了的）的相处过程我也觉得挺温馨的。后面主角暴瘦五十斤，我超级心疼呜呜[哭][哭]
总而言之，虽然结尾不太好，但是前面的所有我都很喜欢，可能也有点宿命（？）我平时不太看评分低的文，但今天就是看了这本，也确实没让我失望，希望大大继续加油!"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1720612613,"group_id":"7337874248343505982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyJVpi57TxfStQJmDH7+qA0=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2b0b427fdd7049638ea5a434d5d01a8a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796279&x-signature=kYOPS9VXZhfE6x9W1lEu3zWvZdc%3D","user_id":"93082668391","user_name":"实在的阿葵亚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93082668391","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7337874248343505982","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈+副本+无女主+无cp+无敌流+系统流+爽文+幽默风趣+逗比沙雕+剧情流+…】
书名：又《我不要脸在怪谈混的风生水起。》
简介：灵气复苏，恐怖降临。
龙国怪谈战败八次，第九次是龙国最后的希望。
然而这次，怪谈却挑选了一个谁也不认识的人——顾逸
【顾逸，谁取的名字，是让他故意来搞笑吗！】
【不是吧，我龙国来了个故意，不会是故意搞鬼的吧！】
【算了，算了，只能接受了，希望这个故意，能够故意赢一下就好。】
众人对顾逸好感度降为o，觉得龙国这次要完了。
【哈哈哈哈，喊桑思密达，瓦大喜就是来嘲笑你们的，龙国已经无人可用了。】
【连输了八次，这次输了是不是要屁滚尿流逃到我们泡菜国，我们可不随便收你们。】
就在所有人觉得没有希望时。
顾逸觉醒技能【顾逸——厚颜无耻（不要脸）：ssss级别。】
顾逸本人：“.......”好像还挺合适的。
毕竟一个八块的肉夹馍硬是让他分开变成了三块钱。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe0ade8e2bcd88ad595619818431bf90f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"墨子青青","author_id":"","book_id":"7337874248343505982","book_name":"怪谈：我一孤儿，竟是怪谈之子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dra
